$comment: Coverage thresholds for orchestrator agents and CI. Portable across projects — adjust values per-repo.
$comment-project: seal-harness is a Haskell/cabal project. Tests run via `make test` (wraps `nix develop --command cabal test`). HPC (Haskell Program Coverage) instrumentation is not yet wired into the build — until it is, the enforcement command runs the test suite and the line/branch/function/statement thresholds below are aspirational (not measured). To enable real coverage enforcement, add `cabal test --enable-coverage` (or an HPC wrapper) and update this file.

enforcement.description: Orchestrator agents MUST run the enforcement command and check coverage against these thresholds before marking any task complete or creating a PR. If coverage drops below any threshold, the task fails. NOTE: HPC instrumentation is pending for this repo; until then the command runs the test suite but does not measure line/branch/function/statement coverage.
